case_title: DARRELL GALLI VS. ASHLEY DUOZCHIEN-PAUL et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALLI, DARRELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUOZCHIEN-PAUL, ASHLEY GARCIA, MICIAH $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,205.00, DEFENDANTS ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY RESPONSIBLE FOR PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT. SAID JUDGMENT IS $9,700.00 FOR BACK RENT PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, $153.00 FOR JUNE 2020 RENT AND $460.00 FOR LATE FEES PER PARAGRAPH 3 OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES AMOUNT OF DAMAGES IN EXCESS OF $10,000.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) SERVED JUL-04-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, MICIAH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) SERVED JUL-04-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUOZCHIEN-PAUL, ASHLEY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF DARRELL GALLI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ASHLEY DOUZCHIEN-PAUL AND MICIAH GARCIA ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GALLI, DARRELL AS TO DEFENDANT DUOZCHIEN-PAUL, ASHLEY GARCIA, MICIAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
